sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ الذَّكَاءُ الِاصْطِنَاعِيُّ الْإِنْسَانَ فِي حَلِّ الْمُشْكِلَاتِ الصَّعْبَةِ.
sentences.translation: Umjetna inteligencija pomaže čovjeku u rješavanju teških problema.
sentences.translationEn: Artificial intelligence helps humans solve difficult problems.

sentences.arabic: تَسْتَخْدِمُ الشَّرِكَاتُ الْكَبِيرَةُ هَذِهِ التِّقْنِيَّةَ لِتَحْسِينِ خِدْمَاتِهَا.
sentences.translation: Velike kompanije koriste ovu tehnologiju kako bi poboljšale svoje usluge.
sentences.translationEn: Large companies use this technology to improve their services.

sentences.arabic: فِي الْمُسْتَقْبَلِ، سَتَتَطَوَّرُ الْآلَاتُ لِتُصْبِحَ أَكْثَرَ ذَكَاءً وَفَاعِلِيَّةً.
sentences.translation: U budućnosti će se mašine razvijati da postanu pametnije i efikasnije.
sentences.translationEn: In the future, machines will develop to become smarter and more efficient.
